channel.title: Windows on DevOpsTales
channel.description: Recent content in Windows on DevOpsTales

item.title: How to Configure Windows RADIUS and UniFi Controller
item.description: Implementing 802.1X wireless authentication with Windows NPS (Network Policy Server) and UniFi access points provides enterprise-grade security for your wireless network. This updated guide for 2026 covers Windows Server 2022/2025 and the latest UniFi Controller.

item.title: Firewall Ports for AD Domain Join
item.description: Joining clients to an Active Directory domain requires specific firewall ports to be open. This updated guide for 2026 covers the minimum and recommended ports for Windows 11/Server 2022+ domain joins, including pfSense firewall configuration examples.

item.title: Move Windows Certificate Authority to another server
item.description: In this post I will show how to move Windows Certificate Authority role to another Server.

item.title: How to: Configure Firefox to use Windows Certificate Store via GPO
item.description: I ran into an issue when I enabled HTTPS Inspection on our transparent proxy and Firefox had a certificate error for everyone.

item.title: Subject Alternative Name in Active Dyrectory LDAPS Cerificate
item.description: In this post I will show you how you can configure custom Subject Alternative Name in Active Directory LDAPS certificate.

item.title: Active Directory Configure secure LDAPS
item.description: In this post I will show you how you can configure LDAPS in Active Directory.

item.title: Migrate BIND to Windows DNS
item.description: Migrate dns Zones from bind to Windows DNS Server

item.title: Override a single external hostname with internal DNS-entry
item.description: Override a single external hostname with internal DNS-entry
